description: Single-event reference hook for SessionStart. Fires once when a Claude session begins; appends a timestamped marker PLUS the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-sessionstart.log so authors can see exactly what Claude sends a hook.

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) sessionStart fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-sessionstart.log
